allow: Bash(python3 -m venv /tmp/pdfenv && source /tmp/pdfenv/bin/activate && pip install pymupdf 2>&1)

Bash(source /tmp/pdfenv/bin/activate && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "/Users/faridgarayev/Desktop/advancedtopicquiz/Identity with WindowsServer.pdf"
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

print\(f"Total pages: {doc.page_count}"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

for page_num in range\(doc.page_count\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"PAGE {page_num + 1}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    print\(text\)

doc.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(source /tmp/pdfenv/bin/activate && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "/Users/faridgarayev/Desktop/advancedtopicquiz/Identity with WindowsServer.pdf"
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

# Save all extracted text to a file for easy access
output_path = "/Users/faridgarayev/Desktop/advancedtopicquiz/extracted_text.txt"

with open\(output_path, "w", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    f.write\(f"Total pages: {doc.page_count}\\n"\)
    f.write\("=" * 80 + "\\n"\)
    
    for page_num in range\(doc.page_count\):
        page = doc[page_num]
        text = page.get_text\(\)
        f.write\(f"\\n{'='*80}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"PAGE {page_num + 1}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"{'='*80}\\n"\)
        f.write\(text + "\\n"\)

doc.close\(\)
print\(f"Text extracted to: {output_path}"\)

import os
size = os.path.getsize\(output_path\)
print\(f"File size: {size:,} bytes \({size/1024:.1f} KB\)"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(source /tmp/pdfenv/bin/activate && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "/Users/faridgarayev/Desktop/advancedtopicquiz/Identity with WindowsServer.pdf"
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)

# Print pages 1-100
for page_num in range\(0, 100\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\).strip\(\)
    if text:
        print\(f"\\n--- PAGE {page_num + 1} ---"\)
        print\(text\)

doc.close\(\)
PYEOF)
